Primeira Parte:
                 A9(11)  Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
The heart is a bloom
       D6(9)                  A9(11)
Shoots up through the stony ground
            A9(11)  Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
There's no room
     D6(9)                A9(11)
No space to rent in this town

               A9(11)  Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
You're out of luck
         D6(9)                  A9(11)
And the reason that you had to care
                 A9(11)  Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
The traffic is stuck
                D6(9)      A9(11)
And you're not moving anywhere
                    A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
You thought you'd found a friend
            D6(9)         A9(11)
To take you out of this place
        A9(11) Bm(11) D6(9)  G6
Someone you   could  lend a hand
      D6(9)     A9(11)
In return for grace

Refrão:
                  A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
It's a beautiful day
D6(9)                 A9(11)
      Sky falls, you feel like
                  A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
It's a beautiful day
       D6(9)       A9(11)
Don't let it get away

Primeira Parte com variação na letra:
               A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
You're on the road
            D6(9)     A9(11)
But you've got no destination
               A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
You're in the mud
        D6(9)            A9(11)
In the maze of her imagination
              A9(11)      Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
You love this        town
D6(9)         A9(11)
Even if that doesn't ring true
        A9(11) Bm(11) D6(9)  G6
You've been    all    over
          D6(9)         A9(11)
And it's been all over you

                  A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6
It's a beautiful day
       D6(9)       A9(11)
Don't let it get away
                  A9(11)   Bm(11)  D6(9)  G6

 D6(9)/F# G6
